description.ko: FLORA-9은 생물학적 진화와 디지털 아키텍처의 융합을 나타내며, 빛나는 뿌리와 수정 같은 잎을 통해 데이터가 흐르는 합성 생태계의 핵심 요소입니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents the convergence of biological evolution and digital architecture, a centerpiece of a synthetic ecosystem where data flows through luminous roots and crystalline leaves.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of FLORA-9, a synthetic botanical entity featuring translucent crystalline petals with integrated microcircuitry, glowing fiber-optic pollen, bioluminescent teal and violet veins, set in a dense digital rainforest with holographic spores and soft bokeh lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, cyberpunk nature aesthetic.
